next_steps: Collect stool sample for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Request urgent authorization and administration of Botulism Immune Globulin Intravenous (BabyBIG)
Review history for potential honey ingestion or environmental exposures to soil/dust
Consider genetic testing for spinal muscular atrophy and congenital myasthenic syndromes
Discontinue broad-spectrum antibiotics if blood/CSF cultures remain negative and suspicion for botulism remains high
